history.notes: Project conceived and documented in TECA_old (Noesis V1) and TECA (Sibyl)
6-perspective startup debate completed in TECA_old. Go with focus decision.
Probe design: Phase 1-3 (ROME validation, TDA gradients, TECS core) with 5 null baselines and pre-registered decision gates
Startup debate: 6 perspectives, Go with focus consensus. Kill gates defined.
All pilot experiments executed: ROME 100% efficacy, TECS d=0.050 (negative path), H6 rejected, H7 confirmed, MEMIT d~0.63
